title: Grass Is Hay!
description: Changes the recipes involving hay to use short grass instead of wheat.
body:
This mod changes the recipes of crafting hay so that you can make hay with 9 (short) grass instead of 9 wheat, and you can craft 9 (short) grass with hay.
Report bugs on the Discord server.
Curseforge (discontinued): https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/grass-is-hay
